pr.title: Record: 5-gram Eval Cache + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon val_bpb: 1.0920 (3-seed mean, std 0.0007) | ~15.9 MB | 8×H100 SXM

output.summary: Introduces a CPU-side confidence-gated 5-gram cache that mixes with sliding-window base scores to boost eval predictions without extra training overhead.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Evaluation innovation applied after standard training; no val-only training.
techniques: Sliding-window eval with backward-looking n-gram updates
